actions.script: var socialBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.ds-sign-in-form__social-button'); if (socialBtns.length > 0) { socialBtns[0].click(); return 'google_clicked'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) { var svg = btns[i].querySelector('path[fill="#4285f4"]'); if (svg) { btns[i].click(); return 'google_clicked'; } } return 'google_not_found';

var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked'; } return 'account_not_found';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('chat.deepseek.com') !== -1 && window.location.pathname.indexOf('sign_in') === -1) { return 'login_complete'; } var account = document.querySelector('div[data-identifier][role="link"]') || document.querySelector('div[data-identifier]') || document.querySelector('.VV3oRb[role="link"]'); if (account) { account.click(); return 'account_clicked_retry'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue') { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked'; } } return 'not_found';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('chat.deepseek.com') !== -1 && window.location.pathname.indexOf('sign_in') === -1) { return 'login_complete'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue') { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked'; } } return 'continue_not_found';

if (window.location.hostname.indexOf('chat.deepseek.com') !== -1 && window.location.pathname.indexOf('sign_in') === -1) { return 'login_complete'; } var btns = document.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { if (btns[j].textContent.trim() === 'Continue') { btns[j].click(); return 'continue_clicked_retry'; } } return 'continue_not_found';
